ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "to_user" TEXT /* Username of the user the tweet is directed to (if any) */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets of the tweet */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) for the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geographical location of the tweet (if available) */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentions in the tweet (comma-separated usernames) */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags in the tweet (comma-separated hashtags) */,
  "permalink" TEXT /* Permalink to the tweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is a retweet or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_to_user FOREIGN KEY ("to_user") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_username FOREIGN KEY ("username") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio or description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the user */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the user's location */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet where the mention occurs */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being mentioned */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., username, hashtag, keyword) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_category" TEXT /* Category of the hashtag (e.g., politics, entertainment, sports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_hashtag_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet-hashtag relationship */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" TEXT /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., article, video, image) */,
  "link_title" TEXT /* Title of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_links" (
  "tweet_link_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet-link relationship */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "link_id" TEXT /* ID of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_links_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_links_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES links ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that is being replied to */,
  "replied_to_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that contains the reply */,
  "replied_to_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who is being replied to */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text content of the reply */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was posted */,
  "reply_type" TEXT /* Type of reply (e.g., direct reply, indirect reply) */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" TEXT /* Status ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_replied_to_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("replied_to_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_replied_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("replied_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that is being retweeted */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who retweeted the tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the retweet was posted */,
  "retweet_type" TEXT /* Type of retweet (e.g., original retweet, retweet with comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that is being favorited */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who favorited the tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the favorite was added */,
  "favorite_type" TEXT /* Type of favorite (e.g., like, unlike) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role */,
  "mapping_status" TEXT /* Status of the user-role mapping (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
